title: Primary Sources
intro: This page gathers primary sources used in the Town of Islip History Project. These documents include colonial laws, Revolutionary-era state records, town minutes, government resolutions, and other records that help explain life in Islip Precinct during the American Revolution.
note: Some documents are transcribed from eighteenth- and nineteenth-century printed sources. Spelling, capitalization, punctuation, and wording may reflect the original source or the available transcription. Short notes explain why each document matters to Islip.
